recommendations.title: Kalifornia
recommendations.overview: A journalist duo go on a tour of serial killer murder sites with two companions, unaware that one of them is a serial killer himself.

recommendations.title: Gone in Sixty Seconds
recommendations.overview: Ex-car thief Randall Raines is forced out of retirement to save his brother Kip after a boost gone wrong. With the help of allies old and new, they race to meet the demands of notorious crime boss Raymond Calitri as the police are in hot pursuit.

recommendations.title: Swordfish
recommendations.overview: Rogue agent Gabriel Shear is determined to get his mitts on $9 billion stashed in a secret Drug Enforcement Administration account. He wants the cash to fight terrorism, but lacks the computer skills necessary to hack into the government mainframe. E

recommendations.title: Season of the Witch
recommendations.overview: A 14th century Crusader returns with his comrade to a homeland devastated by the Black Plague. The Church commands the two knights to transport a witch to a remote abbey, where monks will perform a ritual in hopes of ending the pestilence.

recommendations.title: The Thing
recommendations.overview: A research team in Antarctica is hunted by a shape-shifting alien that assumes the appearance of its victims.

recommendations.title: 47 Bombs
recommendations.overview: When an explosion at a gas station kills a policeman, "Gebbels" from homicide is assigned to the case. The investigation leads him to the trail of a bomb maker and kidnapper, behind dozens of attacks in Poland initiating a confrontation and all-out w

recommendations.title: Chocolat
recommendations.overview: In the winter of 1959, a single mother and her young daughter arrive in a rural French town, where they open an unusual chocolate shop that disrupts the moral fiber of the strictly Catholic townsfolk and mayor.

recommendations.title: Flicka 2
recommendations.overview: Carrie is a big-city teenager whose life is turned upside down when she moves to a horse ranch in Wyoming to live with her father. But everything changes when Carrie meets Flicka, a wild, jet-black mustang who's just as free-spirited and strong-wille

recommendations.title: On Probation
recommendations.overview: Mariano is a psychologist who must fulfill community service after losing a lawsuit by a traffic accident. He is forced to provide therapeutic support to Alfredo, a policeman depressed over his wife cheating on him. Mariano is then accidentally invol

recommendations.title: Beckett
recommendations.overview: An American tourist in Greece finds himself on the run after a tragic accident plunges him into a political conspiracy that makes him a target for assassination.
